# Detome Design System

A professional, customizable design system built with Svelte 5, Tailwind CSS, and bits-ui primitives. Includes 60+ accessible, type-safe UI components.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: Svelte 5 with runes-based reactivity ($props, $state, $derived, $effect)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4 with CSS custom properties for theming
- **Primitives**: bits-ui v2 for accessibility-first headless components
- **Icons**: @lucide/svelte for consistent iconography
- **TypeScript**: Strict mode with comprehensive type definitions
- **Date Handling**: @internationalized/date for date components

## Installation

```bash
npm install @requify/requify-design-system
# or
yarn add @requify/requify-design-system
# or
pnpm add @requify/requify-design-system
```

## Quick Start

First, add the CSS import to your global CSS file (e.g., `app.css`):

```css
@import 'tailwindcss';

/* Import design system styles - REQUIRED for components to work properly */
@source '../node_modules/@requify/requify-design-system/**/*.{svelte,js}';
```

Then import components and enums:

```typescript
// Import components and enums
import { Button, Card, Input } from '@requify/requify-design-system';
import { ButtonVariant, ComponentSize } from '@requify/requify-design-system';
```

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { Button, Card, Input, Label } from '@requify/requify-design-system';
  import { ButtonVariant } from '@requify/requify-design-system';

  let inputValue = '';
</script>

<Card variant="default">
  <h3>Example Card</h3>
  <Label for="input">Enter text:</Label>
  <Input id="input" bind:value={inputValue} placeholder="Type something..." />
  <Button variant={ButtonVariant.PRIMARY}>Submit</Button>
</Card>
```

## Available Components

### Foundation Components

#### Button
Clickable button with multiple visual variants (primary, secondary, outline, ghost, danger, success) and sizes (xs, sm, md, lg, xl). Supports loading state, icons, and full-width. Wraps bits-ui.Button.Root.

**Props:**
- `variant`: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'outline' | 'ghost' | 'danger' | 'success' (default: 'primary')
- `size`: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' (default: 'md')
- `loading`: boolean (default: false)
- `disabled`: boolean (default: false)
- `fullWidth`: boolean (default: false)
- `icon`: Snippet (icon slot)
- `children`: Snippet (button content)
- `onclick`: (e: MouseEvent) => void
- `href`: string (renders as link if provided)
- `type`: 'button' | 'submit' | 'reset' (default: 'button')

**Accessibility:** Keyboard navigation (Enter, Space), visible focus ring, ARIA button role.

#### Card
Container component with variants for different visual styles. Can render as link when href provided.

**Props:**
- `variant`: 'default' | 'bordered' | 'elevated' | 'flat' | 'glass' (default: 'default')
- `padding`: 'none' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' (default: 'md')
- `hoverable`: boolean (default: false)
- `href`: string (renders as <a> if provided)
- `children`: Snippet

#### Input
Text input with error states, left/right icon slots, clearable option, and size variants.

**Props:**
- `size`: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' (default: 'md')
- `error`: string (displays error message below input)
- `clearable`: boolean (shows X button to clear value, default: false)
- `left`: Snippet (left icon slot)
- `right`: Snippet (right icon slot)
- `value`: string (bindable)
- `disabled`: boolean (default: false)
- `id`: string (for label association)

**Accessibility:** Proper label association via for/id attributes, error state with ARIA, keyboard navigation.

#### Label
Form label component with proper for/id attribute handling for accessibility.

**Props:**
- `for`: string (id of associated input)
- `required`: boolean (shows asterisk, default: false)
- `children`: Snippet

#### Badge
Small status indicator with semantic colors and dismissible option. Can render as link.

**Props:**
- `variant`: 'default' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info' (default: 'default')
- `size`: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' (default: 'md')
- `dismissable`: boolean (shows X button, default: false)
- `onclose`: () => void (callback when dismissed)
- `href`: string (renders as link if provided)
- `children`: Snippet

#### Spinner
Loading spinner for async operations. Simple, animated loading indicator.

#### ButtonGroup
Groups buttons together with proper spacing and visual connection.

#### CloseButton
Pre-styled close button (X icon) for modals and panels.

### Form Components

#### Checkbox
Boolean input with checked/unchecked/indeterminate states. Wraps bits-ui.Checkbox.Root.

**Props:**
- `checked`: boolean (bindable)
- `indeterminate`: boolean (tri-state, bindable, default: false)
- `disabled`: boolean (default: false)
- `required`: boolean (default: false)
- `name`: string
- `value`: string
- `id`: string (for label association)
- `onCheckedChange`: (checked: boolean | 'indeterminate') => void
- `children`: Snippet (label content)

**Accessibility:** Native checkbox keyboard support, label association, indeterminate state ARIA.

#### Switch
Toggle switch with variants (primary, secondary, success, error, warning, info). Wraps bits-ui.Switch.Root for accessibility.

**Props:**
- `checked`: boolean (bindable)
- `variant`: AccentVariant | AccentVariantType (default: 'primary')
  - Options: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success' | 'error' | 'warning' | 'info'
- `disabled`: boolean (default: false)
- `required`: boolean (default: false)
- `name`: string
- `value`: string
- `id`: string (for label association)
- `children`: Snippet (label content displayed next to switch)
- `leftLabel`: Snippet (label content displayed to the left of the switch)
- `class`: string (additional CSS classes)
- `onCheckedChange`: (checked: boolean) => void

**Accessibility:** Keyboard toggle (Enter, Space), visible focus ring, ARIA switch role, proper label association.

#### Select
Dropdown select with keyboard navigation and custom styling. Wraps bits-ui.Select.Root.

**Props:**
- `value`: string | number | null (bindable)
- `options`: SelectOption[] (array of { value, label, disabled })
- `placeholder`: string (default: 'Select an option')
- `disabled`: boolean (default: false)
- `required`: boolean (default: false)
- `error`: string
- `onChange`: (value: string | number | null | undefined) => void
- `children`: Snippet (custom option rendering)
- `id`: string

**Interface:**
```typescript
interface SelectOption {
  value: string | number | null;
  label?: string;
  disabled?: boolean;
}
```

**Accessibility:** Full keyboard navigation, ARIA combobox, screen reader support.

#### SelectItem
Individual select option item for custom rendering in Select.

**Props:**
- `value`: string (option value)
- `label`: string (display label text)
- `disabled`: boolean (default: false)
- `children`: Snippet (custom option content, e.g. icon + text)

#### RadioGroup
Radio button group with keyboard navigation. Wraps bits-ui.RadioGroup.Root.

**Props:**
- `value`: string (bindable)
- `options`: RadioOption[] (alternative to children, default: [])
- `orientation`: 'horizontal' | 'vertical' (default: 'vertical')
- `disabled`: boolean (default: false)
- `name`: string
- `required`: boolean (default: false)
- `children`: Snippet (RadioItem components, alternative to options)
- `class`: string (additional CSS classes)

Note: there is no `onChange` prop — use `bind:value` to react to changes.

**Interface:**
```typescript
interface RadioOption {
  value: string;
  label: string;
  disabled?: boolean;
}
```

#### RadioItem
Individual radio button item for RadioGroup.

**Props:**
- `value`: string
- `disabled`: boolean (default: false)
- `id`: string (for label association; auto-generated per instance if omitted)
- `labelClickable`: boolean (if true, clicking the label also selects the radio, default: true)
- `children`: Snippet (label content)

#### Datepicker
Date selection component with custom styling and keyboard support. Wraps bits-ui.DatePicker with @internationalized/date.

**Props:**
- `value`: Date | undefined (bindable, undefined if no date selected)
- `minValue`: Date (minimum selectable date)
- `maxValue`: Date (maximum selectable date)
- `class`: string (additional CSS classes)
- `onChange`: () => void (callback when date selection changes)

**Accessibility:** Full keyboard date navigation, ARIA datepicker role, screen reader friendly.

#### DateRangePicker
Date range selection with validation. Wraps bits-ui.DateRangePicker with @internationalized/date.

**Props:**
- `value`: DateRange | Date (bindable)
  - Can be { start?: Date; end?: Date } for range
  - Or single Date for start-only selection
- `class`: string (additional CSS classes)
- `onChange`: () => void (callback when date range changes)

**Interface:**
```typescript
interface DateRange {
  start?: Date;
  end?: Date;
}
```

#### Search
Search input (`type="search"`) with a built-in leading search icon.

**Props:**
- `value`: string (bindable)
- `size`: ComponentSize | ComponentSizeType ('xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl', default: 'md')
- `placeholder`: string (default: 'Search...')
- `class`: string

Note: unlike Input, this does not have `error`/`clearable`/`left`/`right` props.

### Navigation Components

#### Sidebar
Sidebar navigation container. Provides the active URL to child items via context.

**Props:**
- `activeUrl`: string (current page URL, passed to children via context for active-state highlighting)
- `children`: Snippet (SidebarGroup, SidebarItem, SidebarDropdown components)
- `class`: string

#### SidebarWrapper
Container for sidebar with proper layout and transitions.

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet
- `class`: string

#### SidebarGroup
Groups sidebar items together with optional rounded background styling.

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet (SidebarItem, SidebarDropdown components)
- `rounded`: boolean (wraps items in a rounded background container, default: false)
- `class`: string

#### SidebarItem
Individual sidebar navigation item (anchor) with active-state and icon support.

**Props:**
- `label`: string
- `href`: string
- `icon`: Snippet
- `children`: Snippet
- `nested`: boolean (indents item for nested navigation, default: false)
- `class`: string

#### SidebarDropdown
Collapsible dropdown section within sidebar for nested navigation.

**Props:**
- `label`: string
- `icon`: Snippet
- `children`: Snippet (SidebarItem components)
- `defaultOpen`: boolean (default: false)
- `class`: string

#### Tabs
Tabbed interface with keyboard navigation. Wraps bits-ui.Tabs.Root.

**Props:**
- `value`: string (active tab, bindable)
- `onValueChange`: (value: string) => void
- `children`: Snippet (TabsList, TabsContent components)

**Accessibility:** Left/Right arrow navigation, Tab/Shift+Tab to focus list, Enter/Space to activate.

#### TabsList
Container for tab triggers with visual selection indicator.

#### TabsTrigger
Individual tab trigger button.

**Props:**
- `value`: string (tab identifier)
- `disabled`: boolean
- `children`: Snippet (tab label)

#### TabsContent
Content panel for each tab.

**Props:**
- `value`: string (must match trigger value)
- `children`: Snippet (tab content)

#### Breadcrumb
Hierarchical navigation trail for showing page hierarchy.

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet (BreadcrumbItem components)

#### BreadcrumbItem
Individual breadcrumb item with separator and link.

**Props:**
- `href`: string (if provided, renders as `<a>`; if omitted, renders as `<span>` for the current page)
- `home`: boolean (if true, suppresses the separator chevron before this item, default: false)
- `children`: Snippet
- `class`: string

Note: there is no `current` prop — omitting `href` is what renders the item as plain text.

#### Accordion
Collapsible content panels with keyboard navigation. Wraps bits-ui.Accordion.Root.

**Props:**
- `value`: string | string[] (open item(s), bindable — string when `multiple` is false, string[] when true)
- `multiple`: boolean (allow multiple panels open at once, default: false)
- `disabled`: boolean (disables all interaction, default: false)
- `children`: Snippet (AccordionItem components)
- `class`: string

Note: there is no `type` or `collapsible` prop — pass `multiple` instead, and there is no `onValueChange` (use `bind:value`).

**Accessibility:** Space/Enter to toggle, arrow keys between items, ARIA expanded states.

#### AccordionItem
Individual accordion panel with header and content.

**Props:**
- `value`: string (item identifier, required)
- `disabled`: boolean (default: false)
- `title`: string (header text; alternative to `header` snippet)
- `header`: Snippet (custom header content, alternative to `title`)
- `children`: Snippet (accordion content)
- `class`: string

#### Dropdown
Dropdown menu with keyboard navigation. Wraps bits-ui.DropdownMenu.Root.

**Props:**
- `open`: boolean (bindable)
- `align`: 'start' | 'center' | 'end' (default: 'start')
- `trigger`: Snippet<[{ props: Record<string, unknown> }]> (spread `props` onto your own trigger element, required)
- `children`: Snippet (DropdownItem, DropdownDivider, DropdownHeader, DropdownLink)

**Accessibility:** Arrow key navigation, Space/Enter to select, Escape to close, focus trap.

#### DropdownItem
Individual dropdown menu item.

**Props:**
- `disabled`: boolean
- `onclick`: (e: MouseEvent) => void
- `children`: Snippet
- `class`: string

#### DropdownDivider
Visual separator between dropdown sections.

#### DropdownHeader
Header text for dropdown sections.

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet

#### DropdownLink
Dropdown item that renders as link.

**Props:**
- `href`: string (required)
- `onclick`: (e: MouseEvent) => void
- `children`: Snippet
- `class`: string

#### Pagination
Pagination controls with previous/next buttons and a caller-supplied list of page links.

**Props:**
- `pages`: PageItem[] (required — array of `{ name: string; href: string; active?: boolean }`)
- `previous`: () => void (shows the previous button when provided)
- `next`: () => void (shows the next button when provided)
- `size`: ComponentSize | ComponentSizeType (default: 'md')
- `prevContent`: Snippet (custom previous-button content, replaces chevron icon)
- `nextContent`: Snippet (custom next-button content, replaces chevron icon)
- `class`: string

Note: page items render as `<a href>` — this component does not manage page state (no `currentPage`/`totalPages`/`onPageChange`/page-size selector); the caller builds the `pages` array and supplies `previous`/`next` handlers.

### Feedback Components

#### Alert
Informational message with variants (info, success, warning, error) and dismissible option.

**Props:**
- `variant`: 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' (default: 'info')
- `dismissible`: boolean (shows X button, default: false)
- `onDismiss`: () => void
- `icon`: Snippet (custom icon, defaults to variant icon)
- `children`: Snippet (alert message)

**Accessibility:** role="alert", ARIA live region, dismiss button with aria-label.

#### Toast
Single toast notification. Renders either from a `toast` data object (id, variant, message) or custom `children`.

**Props:**
- `toast`: { id: string; variant?: StatusVariant; message?: string } (data object, alternative to children)
- `onDismiss`: (id: string) => void (called with toast.id when dismissed)
- `dismissable`: boolean (shows dismiss button; auto-true if toast+onDismiss given, default: false)
- `onclose`: () => void (called on dismiss regardless of toast/onDismiss)
- `color`: StatusVariant | StatusVariantType (default: 'info') — alternative to `toast.variant`
- `children`: Snippet (custom content, overrides toast.message)
- `class`: string

**Accessibility:** role="alert", aria-live="polite", dismiss button with aria-label, fly-in animation.

#### ToastProvider
Fixed-position container that renders a list of toasts and any app content passed as children.

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet (app content, rendered below the toast container)
- `toasts`: Array<{ id: string; variant?: StatusVariant; message?: string }> (default: [])
- `position`: 'top-left' | 'top-center' | 'top-right' | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-center' | 'bottom-right' (default: 'top-right')
- `onDismiss`: (id: string) => void (called when a toast's dismiss button is clicked)

Note: there is no built-in auto-dismiss/`duration` — call sites manage the `toasts` array and remove entries themselves (e.g. via `setTimeout`).

#### Modal
Dialog modal with backdrop and keyboard dismissal. Wraps bits-ui.Dialog.Root.

**Props:**
- `open`: boolean (bindable)
- `size`: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | 'full' (default: 'md', max-widths: 384px, 448px, 768px, 1280px, 100%)
- `dismissible`: boolean (default: true)
- `outsideclose`: boolean (click outside to close, default: true)
- `title`: string
- `description`: string
- `children`: Snippet (modal content)
- `footer`: Snippet (modal footer)
- `header`: Snippet (custom header)
- `onClose`: () => void
- `form`: boolean (renders as form element)
- `onsubmit`: (e: SubmitEvent) => void

**Accessibility:** Focus trap, Escape to close, ARIA dialog role, proper focus management.

#### AlertDialog
Alert dialog for critical confirmations (destructive actions, warnings). Wraps bits-ui.AlertDialog.Root.

**Props:**
- `open`: boolean (bindable)
- `variant`: StatusVariant 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' (default: 'info')
- `title`: string
- `description`: string
- `confirmText`: string (default: 'Confirm')
- `cancelText`: string (default: 'Cancel')
- `onConfirm`: () => void
- `onCancel`: () => void
- `children`: Snippet (custom content between description and actions)

**Accessibility:** role="alertdialog" (native bits-ui AlertDialog primitive, not Dialog), Escape triggers Cancel (not a silent dismiss), clicking outside does not dismiss by default, focus on primary action.

#### Drawer
Slide-out panel from screen edge with backdrop and transitions.

**Props:**
- `open`: boolean (bindable)
- `placement`: 'left' | 'right' | 'top' | 'bottom' (default: 'left')
- `backdrop`: boolean (default: true)
- `transitionParams`: Partial<FlyParams> (custom transition)
- `children`: Snippet

**Accessibility:** Focus trap, Escape to close, ARIA dialog role, smooth transitions.

#### Tooltip
Hover tooltip with positioning options. Wraps bits-ui.Tooltip.Root.

**Props:**
- `content`: string | Snippet (tooltip text or rich content)
- `children`: Snippet (trigger element, required)
- `side`: 'top' | 'right' | 'bottom' | 'left' (default: 'top')
- `align`: 'start' | 'center' | 'end' (default: 'center')
- `delayDuration`: number (ms before showing, default: 200)
- `disableHoverableContent`: boolean

**Accessibility:** role="tooltip", ARIA described-by, keyboard accessible, screen reader friendly.

#### Popover
Positioned popover with manual trigger control. Wraps bits-ui.Popover.Root.

**Props:**
- `open`: boolean (bindable)
- `side`: 'top' | 'right' | 'bottom' | 'left'
- `align`: 'start' | 'center' | 'end'
- `trigger`: Snippet<[{ props: Record<string, unknown> }]> (spread `props` onto your own trigger element, e.g. `{#snippet trigger({ props })}<Button {...props}>Open</Button>{/snippet}`)
- `children`: Snippet (popover content)

**Accessibility:** Focus trap when open, Escape to close, ARIA attributes correctly delegated to the caller's trigger element via `props`.

### Data Display Components

#### Table
Data table container with optional striping, hover, and border styling.

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet (TableHead, TableBody components)
- `classes`: { div?: string; table?: string } (separate classes for the wrapping div and the table element)
- `striped`: boolean (alternating row background, default: false)
- `hoverable`: boolean (row hover highlight, default: false)
- `noborder`: boolean (removes the outer border, default: false)
- `shadow`: boolean (adds a drop shadow, default: false)
- `color`: TextColor | TextColorType (base text color variant)
- `class`: string

#### TableHead
Table header container.

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet (TableHeadCell components)
- `defaultRow`: boolean (wraps children in a default `<tr>`, default: false)
- `class`: string

#### TableHeadCell
Individual table header cell (`<th scope="col">`). There is no built-in sort state — wire up sorting yourself via `onclick`.

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet
- `padding`: string (default: 'px-6 py-3')
- `onclick`: (event: MouseEvent) => void (e.g. for sorting; pair with your own sort icon in `children`)
- `class`: string

#### TableBody
Table body container for rows.

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet (TableBodyRow components)
- `class`: string

#### TableBodyRow
Individual table row (`<tr>`) with hover states.

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet (TableBodyCell components)
- `color`: TextColor | TextColorType
- `onclick`: (event: MouseEvent) => void
- `class`: string

#### TableBodyCell
Individual table data cell (`<td>`).

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet
- `padding`: string
- `colspan`: number
- `class`: string

#### Progressbar
Linear progress indicator with variants and sizes.

**Props:**
- `progress`: number (0-100, percentage value, default: 0)
- `size`: ComponentSize | string (progress bar height, default: 'md')
  - Named sizes: 'xs' (4px), 'sm' (6px), 'md' (10px), 'lg' (16px), 'xl' (24px)
  - Custom: pass Tailwind height class (e.g., 'h-1')
- `color`: AccentVariant | AccentVariantType (color variant, default: 'primary')
  - Options: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success' | 'error' | 'warning' | 'info'
- `labelInside`: boolean (show percentage inside bar, default: false)
- `labelOutside`: boolean (show percentage above bar, default: false)
- `class`: string (additional CSS classes)

**Accessibility:** role="progressbar", ARIA value attributes, screen reader friendly.

#### Listgroup
Styled container for grouping ListgroupItem components.

**Props:**
- `active`: boolean (reserved for future active-state management; currently has no visual effect, default: false)
- `children`: Snippet (ListgroupItem components)
- `class`: string

#### ListgroupItem
Individual list item. Renders as a native `<button type="button">` — there is no `href`/link mode.

**Props:**
- `disabled`: boolean (native button attribute)
- `onclick`: (e: MouseEvent) => void (native button attribute)
- `children`: Snippet
- `class`: string (e.g. add `bg-primary-50 text-primary-700` for an "active" look, since there is no built-in active prop)

#### StepIndicator
Visual step progress indicator for multi-step workflows.

**Props:**
- `currentStep`: number (1-indexed current step, default: 1)
- `steps`: string[] (step labels, default: ['Step 1', 'Step 2', 'Step 3'])
- `glow`: boolean (adds glow effect to current step, default: false)
- `class`: string
- `children`: Snippet<[{ step: number; label: string }]> (custom content per step, e.g. an icon instead of the step number)

**Accessibility:** Semantic `<ol>`, `aria-current="step"` on the current `<li>`, checkmark icon for completed steps.

#### Indicator
Small positioned status dot (e.g. online/notification marker), absolutely positioned over a `position: relative` parent.

**Props:**
- `variant`: BadgeVariant | BadgeVariantType (color, default: 'default')
  - Options: 'default' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info'
- `size`: ComponentSize | ComponentSizeType (default: 'md')
- `placement`: IndicatorPlacement | IndicatorPlacementType (default: 'top-right')
  - Options: 'top-left' | 'top-center' | 'top-right' | 'center-left' | 'center' | 'center-right' | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-center' | 'bottom-right'
- `border`: boolean (adds a white ring border, default: false)
- `class`: string

Note: this renders only the dot itself (`aria-hidden`, absolutely positioned) — wrap it and its target together in a `position: relative` element yourself. There is no `show`/`offset`/`content` prop.

#### Spinner
Circular loading spinner with size variants.

**Props:**
- `size`: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '4' | '6' | '8' | '10' | '12' | '16' | string (named or numeric Tailwind sizes, or a custom class; default: 'md')
- `class`: string (use to set a text color class, e.g. `text-primary-500`, since the spinner uses `currentColor`)

#### ListPlaceholder
Skeleton placeholder for list items with pulse animation.

**Props:**
- `rows`: number (number of skeleton rows, default: 5)
- `class`: string

#### WidgetPlaceholder
Fixed-layout skeleton placeholder for a card/widget with pulse animation (header row, avatar/icon block, and several content lines).

**Props:**
- `class`: string

Note: there is no `height`/`showHeader`/`showFooter` prop — the skeleton layout is fixed.

### Typography Components

#### Heading
Semantic heading component (renders the matching `<h1>`-`<h6>` element) with a predefined size per tag.

**Props:**
- `tag`: HeadingTag | HeadingTagType ('h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6', default: 'h1') — determines both the rendered element and its default size
- `customSize`: string (custom Tailwind size class, overrides the tag's default size)
- `children`: Snippet
- `class`: string

Note: there is no separate `size`/`weight`/`color`/`id` prop — size comes from `tag` (or `customSize`), and color/id are set via `class`/native passthrough attributes.

#### P
Paragraph text component with size, weight, and color variants.

**Props:**
- `size`: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'base' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '2xl' | '3xl' (default: 'base')
- `weight`: 'normal' | 'medium' | 'semibold' | 'bold' (default: 'normal')
- `color`: 'default' | 'muted' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info' | 'blue' | 'green' | 'red' | 'yellow' | 'purple' (default: 'default')
- `children`: Snippet
- `class`: string

Note: there is no `leading` prop — line-height is fixed (`leading-relaxed`); override via `class` if needed.

#### A
Styled link component with color variants.

**Props:**
- `href`: string (required)
- `color`: TextColor | TextColorType (default: 'primary')
  - Options: 'default' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'muted' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info' | 'blue' | 'green' | 'red' | 'yellow' | 'purple'
- `target`: string (e.g. '_blank')
- `rel`: string (e.g. 'noopener noreferrer')
- `children`: Snippet
- `class`: string

Note: there is no `variant` prop (use `color`) and no built-in `external` icon — add one yourself as a child for external links.

#### Blockquote
Styled blockquote with optional border, background, and italics.

**Props:**
- `border`: boolean (adds a left border, default: false)
- `bg`: boolean (adds background and padding, default: false)
- `italic`: boolean (default: true)
- `cite`: string (native `<blockquote>` attribute, passed through)
- `children`: Snippet
- `class`: string

### Other Components

#### Img
Responsive image with fluid width (`max-w-full h-auto`). A thin wrapper around `<img>`.

**Props:**
- `src`: string (required)
- `alt`: string (required for accessibility)
- `class`: string
- Any other native `<img>` attribute (`loading`, `width`, `height`, `srcset`, `sizes`, etc.) is passed through, but none has a component-level default and there is no fallback-image behavior.

**Accessibility:** Always requires alt text; use `alt=""` for decorative images.

#### Hr
Horizontal rule/separator (`<hr>`) with default spacing and border color.

**Props:**
- `class`: string

Note: there is no `variant` prop — use `class` for dashed/dotted styles (e.g. `class="border-dashed"`).

#### Helper
Form helper text for additional context below inputs.

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet (helper text content)
- `color`: StatusVariant | StatusVariantType (default: 'info')
  - Options: 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'
- `class`: string

#### Toolbar
Flexible, wrapping horizontal container for ToolbarButton/ToolbarGroup.

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet
- `class`: string

Note: there is no `align`/`orientation` prop — use `class` (e.g. `class="flex-col gap-2"`) to change layout.

#### ToolbarButton
Small square icon button for toolbar use (not the same API as Button — no `variant`/`loading`/`href`/`fullWidth`).

**Props:**
- `size`: ComponentSize | ComponentSizeType ('xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg', default: 'sm')
- `children`: Snippet (typically an icon)
- `class`: string
- Native `<button>` attributes (`disabled`, `onclick`, `aria-label`, etc.) are passed through.

#### ToolbarGroup
Groups toolbar buttons with proper spacing.

**Props:**
- `children`: Snippet

## Enums Reference

### ButtonVariant
- PRIMARY, SECONDARY, OUTLINE, GHOST, DANGER, SUCCESS

### BadgeVariant
- DEFAULT, PRIMARY, SECONDARY, SUCCESS, WARNING, ERROR, INFO

### StatusVariant
- INFO, SUCCESS, WARNING, ERROR
- Used by Alert, Toast, AlertDialog, Helper (there is no separate AlertVariant/ToastVariant enum)

### CardVariant
- DEFAULT, BORDERED, ELEVATED, FLAT, GLASS

### ComponentSize
- XS, SM, MD, LG, XL

### ModalSize
- SM (384px), MD (448px), LG (768px), XL (1280px), FULL

### CardPadding
- NONE, SM, MD, LG, XL

### SwitchSize
- SM, MD, LG

### AccentVariant
- PRIMARY, SECONDARY, SUCCESS, ERROR, WARNING, INFO
- Used by Progressbar, Switch (there is no separate ProgressbarVariant enum)

### HeadingTag
- H1, H2, H3, H4, H5, H6

### TextSize
- XS, SM, BASE, LG, XL, XXL, XXXL

### FontWeight
- NORMAL, MEDIUM, SEMIBOLD, BOLD

### TextColor
- DEFAULT, MUTED, PRIMARY, SECONDARY, SUCCESS, WARNING, ERROR, INFO, BLUE, GREEN, RED, YELLOW, PURPLE

### Side
- TOP, RIGHT, BOTTOM, LEFT

### Align
- START, CENTER, END

### DrawerPlacement
- LEFT, RIGHT, TOP, BOTTOM

### IndicatorPlacement
- TOP_LEFT, TOP_CENTER, TOP_RIGHT, CENTER_LEFT, CENTER, CENTER_RIGHT, BOTTOM_LEFT, BOTTOM_CENTER, BOTTOM_RIGHT

### ToastPosition
- TOP_LEFT, TOP_CENTER, TOP_RIGHT, BOTTOM_LEFT, BOTTOM_CENTER, BOTTOM_RIGHT

### Orientation
- HORIZONTAL, VERTICAL

## Theming

All components use CSS custom properties for colors, allowing easy theming.

```css
@import 'tailwindcss';

/* Import design system styles - REQUIRED for components to work properly */
@source '../node_modules/@requify/requify-design-system/**/*.{svelte,js}';

:root {
  /* Override primary brand color */
  --color-primary-500: #your-brand-color;
  --color-primary-600: #your-darker-brand-color;

  /* Override secondary/accent colors */
  --color-secondary-500: #your-accent-color;

  /* Override semantic colors */
  --color-success-500: #your-green;
  --color-error-500: #your-red;
  --color-warning-500: #your-yellow;
  --color-info-500: #your-blue;
}
```

## Accessibility

All components follow WCAG AA/AAA guidelines:
- Keyboard navigation support
- Proper ARIA attributes
- Screen reader compatibility
- Focus management
- Color contrast (4.5:1 minimum)

## Composition Patterns

### Snippet API
Svelte 5 snippets allow flexible content composition:

```svelte
<Button icon>
  {#snippet icon()}
    <Search class="h-4 w-4" />
  {/snippet}
  Search
</Button>
```

### Component Grouping
```svelte
<ButtonGroup>
  <Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
  <Button variant="primary">Confirm</Button>
</ButtonGroup>
```

### Form Composition
```svelte
<Card>
  <Label for="email">Email</Label>
  <Input id="email" error="Invalid email format" />
  <Helper>We'll never share your email</Helper>
</Card>
```

## Best Practices

1. **Always use TypeScript**: All props are strongly typed with interfaces
2. **Use enums for variants**: `ButtonVariant.PRIMARY` instead of strings
3. **Leverage snippets**: For icons, headers, footers, and custom content
4. **Accessibility first**: Always provide labels, alt text, and ARIA attributes
5. **Responsive design**: Use size variants for different screen sizes
6. **Dark mode**: All components support dark mode automatically
7. **Theming**: Override CSS variables instead of hardcoded colors

## Code Examples

### Button with Loading State
```svelte
<Button variant={ButtonVariant.PRIMARY} loading={isSubmitting}>
  {#snippet icon()}
    <Save class="h-4 w-4" />
  {/snippet}
  Save Changes
</Button>
```

### Form with Validation
```svelte
<Card variant="bordered">
  <Label for="name" required>Name</Label>
  <Input
    id="name"
    bind:value={name}
    error={errors.name}
    placeholder="Enter your name" />
</Card>
```

### Modal with Form
```svelte
<Modal
  bind:open={showModal}
  title="Create User"
  size={ModalSize.MD}>
  <Label for="new-user-name">Name</Label>
  <Input id="new-user-name" bind:value={userName} />
  <Label for="new-user-email">Email</Label>
  <Input id="new-user-email" bind:value={userEmail} />

  {#snippet footer()}
    <Button variant="outline" onclick={() => showModal = false}>
      Cancel
    </Button>
    <Button variant="primary" onclick={handleSave}>
      Create User
    </Button>
  {/snippet}
</Modal>
```

### Tabs with Content
```svelte
<Tabs value="overview">
  <TabsList>
    <TabsTrigger value="overview">Overview</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="settings">Settings</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>

  <TabsContent value="overview">
    <Heading tag="h3">Overview</Heading>
    <P>Content goes here</P>
  </TabsContent>

  <TabsContent value="settings">
    <Heading tag="h3">Settings</Heading>
    <P>Configuration options</P>
  </TabsContent>
</Tabs>
```

## Related Packages

- **bits-ui**: Headless primitives for accessibility
- **@lucide/svelte**: Icon components
- **@internationalized/date**: Date handling utilities
- **clsx**: Conditional class utility
- **tailwind-merge**: Tailwind class deduplication

- GitHub: https://github.com/requify/requify-design-system
- Issues: https://github.com/requify/requify-design-system/issues
- Docs: https://github.com/requify/requify-design-system#readme
